title: VoIP Implementation Checklist
description: Prepare your network, phone numbers, devices, and staff before switching providers.

sections.title: Before Cutover
sections.content: Document numbers, users, ring groups, voicemail boxes, emergency addresses, and integrations.

sections.title: After Launch
sections.content: Monitor call quality, support tickets, missed calls, and user adoption for the first few weeks.

faqs.question: How long does number porting take?
faqs.answer: It varies by carrier and provider. Ask for an expected timeline before scheduling launch.
